summary: Comprehensive testing of WYSIWYG Document Editor for Graupner Suite. All core features working correctly: Quote/Order/Invoice create and edit via WYSIWYG editor navigates to proper routes (not modals). Backend APIs 100% passing (20/21 tests). Frontend WYSIWYG flows fully functional.

design_issues.issue: Minor: 'Bearbeiten' button in preview modal has overlay interception - but this doesn't affect functionality since Edit icon in table works correctly

passed_tests: Backend Auth - Login with admin/admin123 (200 OK)
Backend Quotes CRUD - Create, Read, Update all working
Backend Orders CRUD - Create from quote, Read, Update working
Backend Invoices CRUD - Create, Read, Update with deposit_amount working
Backend PDF Generation - Quote/Order/Invoice PDFs generate correctly
Quotes Page - 'Neues Angebot' navigates to /quotes/new WYSIWYG editor
Quotes WYSIWYG - Customer selection, positions, VAT, notes all editable
Quotes WYSIWYG - Save creates quote and redirects to /quotes
Quotes Edit - Edit icon navigates to /quotes/edit/{id} WYSIWYG (not modal)
Orders Page - Lists orders correctly (2 orders in system)
Orders Edit - Edit icon navigates to /orders/edit/{id} WYSIWYG editor (not old modal)
Orders WYSIWYG - Shows AUFTRAGSBESTÄTIGUNG header, pre-filled data, status dropdown
Orders WYSIWYG - Save updates order and redirects back to /orders
Invoices Page - 'Neue Rechnung' navigates to /invoices/new WYSIWYG editor
Invoices WYSIWYG - Shows RECHNUNG header, Anzahlung (deposit) field present
Invoices Edit - Edit icon navigates to /invoices/edit/{id} WYSIWYG editor (not modal)
Document Preview - Clicking row opens preview overlay with document details
Customer -> Quote Flow - 'Angebot erstellen' navigates to /quotes/new?customer={id} with customer pre-selected
critical_code_review_comments: WYSIWYG editor implementation is clean and follows proper React patterns
Customer query param handling works correctly in WysiwygDocumentEditor
All edit handlers in QuotesPage, OrdersPage, InvoicesPage correctly navigate to WYSIWYG routes instead of opening old modals
seed_data_creation: Created test quotes, orders, and invoices during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: WYSIWYG editor fully tested and working. Routes: /quotes/new, /quotes/edit/:id, /orders/edit/:id, /invoices/new, /invoices/edit/:id all navigate to WysiwygDocumentEditor component correctly. Voice/AI features not tested (require OpenAI API key). Document Preview modal works - clicking table row opens preview. Edit icons in tables navigate to WYSIWYG editors (not old form modals).
